name: PC Install Girl
short_description: A girl because her father owes a huge debt is unable to pay, imprisoned in a private prison to work, every day forced to wear sexy clothes live sell computer debt.
detailed_description:
It's a role-playing game, players need to play the role of the heroine, live streaming in a private prison to sell computers to pay off debts.

· Live streaming - actively interact with the audience to accumulate popularity and get customers to buy computers faster.

· Configuration - Write reasonable computer configuration according to customer's needs and budget.

· Installation - Complete the installation of the main computer according to the configuration.

· Display - Display the assembled computer host with graceful posture.

· Living - drinking, eating, bathing, defecating and sleeping in prison to maintain vital signs.
